understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete all levels by placing every selectable piece onto a goal tile simultaneously, switching between pieces as needed, within a limited step budget per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the currently selected piece in grid/pixel coordinates (3 pixels per cell). Adjacent pushable blocks can be pushed in the movement direction if unblocked. Walls and boundaries block movement, but not all blockages are absolute—some require experimentation. The CLICK action switches control to another selectable piece by specifying its exact pixel position, which is essential when multiple pieces must be coordinated to occupy all '+' goal tiles at the same time. The semantic_grid shows a compact view: P=current piece, S=other pieces, B=blocks, #=walls, +=goals.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete all levels by placing every selectable piece onto a goal tile simultaneously, switching between pieces as needed, within a limited step budget per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the currently selected piece in grid/pixel coordinates (3 pixels per cell). Adjacent pushable blocks can be pushed in the movement direction if unblocked. Walls and boundaries block movement, but not all blockages are absolute—some require experimentation. The CLICK action switches control to another selectable piece by specifying its exact pixel position, which is essential when multiple pieces must be coordinated to occupy all '+' goal tiles at the same time. The semantic_grid shows a compact view: P=current piece, S=other pieces, B=blocks, #=walls, +=goals.
